name: How do I do GEO for a local business with multiple cities?
description: Create genuinely distinct location pages with local details, clear service information, and unique answers for each city.

mainEntity.name: How do I do GEO for a local business with multiple cities?

acceptedAnswer.text: For local GEO, build pages that answer location-specific questions clearly and uniquely. A page for Los Angeles should reflect different services, examples, or service-area details than a page for Salt Lake City. Keep the location signal real and useful, not just added to the title.
acceptedAnswer.description: Create genuinely distinct location pages with local details, clear service information, and unique answers for each city.
